content.p: Find the power series centered at x=0 for \renewcommand{\log}{\ln}\displaystyle f(x) = {{Fx}} .

outtro.p: Since \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle {{fx}} = \sum_{ n = {{k1}} }^\infty {{ax}}, we have that \renewcommand{\log}{\ln}\displaystyle {{Fx}} = \sum_{ n = {{k0}} }^\infty {{Ax}}.
